title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Scripbox Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Scripbox Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Scripbox Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Gurgaon. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Scripbox Holdings Services:
Scripbox Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Scripbox Holdings Services!
